description: An accepted implemented requirement loses its VERIFIED_BY graph evidence.
expected_error: Implemented requirement documentation-structure:REQ-0001 has no VERIFIED_BY graph traceability

mutations.replace:
- subject:
    id: documentation-structure:REQ-0001
    type: Requirement
  predicate: VERIFIED_BY
  object:
    id: GATE-DOCS-STRUCTURE
    type: Gate
mutations.with:
- subject:
    id: documentation-structure:REQ-9999
    type: Requirement
  predicate: VERIFIED_BY
  object:
    id: GATE-DOCS-STRUCTURE
    type: Gate
